product.faqShippingContent: Free shipping on orders over $75. Orders are processed within 1–2 business days and delivered within 3–5 business days across Singapore, Malaysia, and Southeast Asia. Tracking information will be sent via email.
product.faqReturnsContent: Due to the nature of health supplements, returns are only accepted for damaged or defective products. Please contact us within 7 days of delivery with photos of the issue. We will arrange a replacement or full refund.
product.faqStorageContent: Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. Keep sachets sealed until use. Once opened, consume within 24 hours. Do not refrigerate.
product.faqDosageContent: Mix one sachet in 150–200ml of warm or cool water (avoid boiling water). Best consumed on an empty stomach in the morning or before bedtime. Do not exceed 2 sachets per day. Suitable for ages 6 and above.
product.reviewsFrom: Reviews are displayed from verified purchasers.

hero.badge: Camela Group Pte. Ltd. · Est. 2026 · Singapore
hero.subtitle: A Singapore-founded company bringing two world-patented health innovations — LivePure Hydrogen Water Technology and Walnut Peptide Nutrition — direct from factory to families across Southeast Asia.

video.title: Camela Group in Action
video.subtitle: See how Camela Group is bringing bioactive peptide science to families across Southeast Asia.

factory.title: Direct From Factory Sales Model
factory.description: This is significant because it saves a massive amount of distribution cost. By utilizing a direct sales model straight from our advanced facilities, we eliminate unnecessary middlemen and pass the savings directly to you.

mission.heading: Mission & Vision
mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To improve lives through innovative bioactive peptide nutrition and functional foods, making scientifically proven wellness solutions accessible to millions of families across Southeast Asia.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To become Southeast Asia's leading bioactive peptide and functional nutrition company, transforming lives through innovative wellness solutions grounded in science and quality.

product.title: Camela Group Walnut Peptide
product.subtitle: Formulated using premium walnut protein and advanced enzymatic hydrolysis technology — delivering highly absorbable bioactive nutrients that support overall health.
product.natural: All Natural · No Preservatives · No Colorants · No Added Flavors
product.manufacturer: Manufactured by Dezhou Lanli Biotechnology Co., Ltd. — a leading high-tech biotechnology enterprise in China.

certs.title: Manufacturing Excellence
certs.subtitle: Every Camela Group product meets rigorous international standards of safety, purity, and consistency for global markets.

pipeline.title: Expanding Our Portfolio
pipeline.description: Camela Group continuously expands its range of functional health products to meet growing demand for evidence-based nutrition. Our future pipeline supports healthy aging, beauty, vitality, recovery, and long-term wellness.

reach.title: Serving Southeast Asia
reach.subtitle: Our primary market is Southeast Asia — one of the world's most dynamic and rapidly growing health and wellness regions.

partner.title: Partner With Us
partner.description: Camela Group actively seeks partnerships with distributors, healthcare practitioners, wellness organisations, retailers, and strategic business partners throughout Southeast Asia. We believe in building long-term relationships based on trust, shared resources, and mutual growth.

products.title: Two Technologies. One Vision.
products.subtitle: Factory-direct from our manufacturing partners — world-patented products delivering science-backed health solutions to families across Southeast Asia.

hydrogen.name: Hydrogen Water Machine
hydrogen.desc: High-concentration molecular hydrogen technology with worldwide patents registered in Korea, USA, and Japan. Awarded at the International Exhibition of Inventions, Geneva 2015.

peptide.name: Walnut Peptide
peptide.desc: Bioactive peptide nutrition through advanced enzymatic hydrolysis — multiple peptide types available, all manufactured at GMP-certified, ISO 22000 & HALAL-certified facilities.

factory.title: Factory Direct · No Middlemen · Worldwide Patents
factory.desc: We are the manufacturer. Every product ships straight from our factory to you — no retailers, no markups, just true factory pricing backed by global patents.

hydrogen.title: LivePure Hydrogen Water Machine
hydrogen.subtitle: World-patented molecular hydrogen technology — clinically supported to neutralize free radicals, reduce oxidative stress, and promote cardiovascular and metabolic wellbeing.
hydrogen.videoTitle: LivePure Hydrogen Water Generator — Official Product Demo

fights.heading: High Concentration Molecular Hydrogen Can Help Fight:

bp.title: High Blood Pressure
bp.desc: Molecular hydrogen's potent antioxidant properties neutralize free radicals, reducing oxidative stress and inflammation associated with high blood pressure.

diabetes.title: Diabetes
diabetes.desc: Molecular hydrogen reduces oxidative stress and inflammation — key factors in diabetes development — helping to manage blood sugar naturally.

fatigue.title: Chronic Fatigue
fatigue.desc: Molecular hydrogen combats fatigue by neutralizing free radicals, reducing oxidative stress, and restoring overall cellular energy levels.

stroke.title: Stroke & Heart Attack
stroke.desc: Supports cardiovascular health, promotes optimal blood flow, and helps reduce the risk of stroke and heart attack through antioxidant action.

patents.heading: World Patented Technology
patents.footnote: Patent registered at Korea Intellectual Property Office (2015) · USA Patent License (2016) · Japan Patent License (2018) · Awarded at International Exhibition of Inventions, Geneva & Seoul International Invention Fair (2015).
